operation: First, an empty 2D CadQuery Sketch object is initialized. A closed ellipse feature is then added to the sketch, with a semi-major axis length of 8 units and a semi-minor axis length of 3 units. No additional modifications are applied to the sketch before it is exported as an STL file.
geometry: This is a flat, planar 2D closed elliptical shape. It has a single smooth, continuous curved perimeter with no sharp corners, with one elongated axis perpendicular to a significantly shorter perpendicular axis, and no internal features or cutouts.
function: This is a basic 2D elliptical profile intended to be used as a foundational template for further 3D CAD operations such as extrusion, cutting, or lofting, or as a standalone shape for decorative, marking, or layout use cases.
